candidates.name: Honeywell
candidates.reason: Aerospace spin-off mechanics, guidance miss, institutional rebalancing pre-June-15 record date
candidates.thesis: The selloff is structurally driven by pre-spin-off institutional rebalancing that will intensify through the June 15 record date and June 29 distribution — the true entry is in the two pure-play entities after the split clears and forced selling exhausts.
